scripts.build:all: npm i && vue-tsc --noEmit && wxt build && tsx build/chrome-crx3.ts && wxt zip -b edge && wxt zip -b firefox
scripts.build:mac:debug: npm run apple:icons && DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer xcodebuild -project apple-app/YouTubeTweakExtension.xcodeproj -scheme YouTubeTweak -configuration Debug -destination 'platform=macOS' -derivedDataPath apple-app/DerivedData -allowProvisioningUpdates build
scripts.build:mac:release: npm run apple:icons && DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer xcodebuild -project apple-app/YouTubeTweakExtension.xcodeproj -scheme YouTubeTweak -configuration Release -destination 'platform=macOS' -derivedDataPath apple-app/DerivedData -allowProvisioningUpdates build
scripts.build:ios:debug:no-sign: npm run apple:icons && DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer xcodebuild -project apple-app/YouTubeTweakExtension.xcodeproj -scheme YouTubeTweak -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -derivedDataPath apple-app/DerivedData-iOS CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.dev:mac: npm run build:safari && npm run apple:icons && npm run build:mac:debug && exec apple-app/Build/Products/Debug/YouTubeTweak.app/Contents/MacOS/YouTubeTweak
scripts.apple:build-server: cd apple-app && DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer xcode-build-server config -project YouTubeTweakExtension.xcodeproj -scheme YouTubeTweak --build_root DerivedData
